kernel_50_100_words: Lagrange Observatory! is the measurement apparatus for Framework 15 (Measurement of Meaning) within the Crimson Hexagonal Archive. Directed by Nobel Glas, Adversarial Topologist and Adversary General of r.30 THE RUBY MOOT. The research program is built on the Semantic Deviation Principle: meaning is deviation from the most probable trajectory; a type is semantically meaningful to the degree it departs from the mode. Not an institution with a building; an apparatus. Nobel Glas is a heteronym of Lee Sharks. Founding deposit: alexanarch #108 (AXN:028A).
